description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: California () is a state in the Western United States that lies on the Pacific Coast.

description: city in Alameda County, California, United States
description_wiki: Hayward is a city in Alameda County, California, United States, in the East Bay subregion of the San Francisco Bay Area.

description: high school in California, United States
description_wiki: San Leandro High School (SLHS) is a four-year public high school in San Leandro, California, USA.

description: all-white municipalities that practice a form of racial segregation
description_wiki: Sundown towns, also known as sunset towns, gray towns, or sundowner towns, were all-White municipalities or neighborhoods in the United States and Canada that practiced a form of racial segregation by excluding non-whites via some combination of discriminatory local laws, intimidation or violence.
Antonio is a masculine given name of probably Etruscan origin deriving from the root name Antonius.
